about_us.0001: About Our Pregnancy Calorie Calculator | AI Nutrition Tool
about_us.0002: Learn about our mission to help expecting mothers have a healthy pregnancy with accurate AI-powered nutrition guidance, transparent methods, and safety limits.
about_us.0007: About Our AI Pregnancy Calorie Calculator
about_us.0010: AI Pregnancy Calorie Calculator is an English SaaS tool that helps pregnant users estimate daily calorie goals, macro targets, meal planning ideas, weekly weight trends, and AI pregnancy nutrition summaries. It is built for education, not diagnosis or treatment.
about_us.0012: Pregnancy nutrition numbers can feel confusing. Our goal is to turn core inputs such as pregnancy week, pre-pregnancy weight, height, activity level, and pregnancy type into plain-English guidance that users can discuss with their own healthcare provider.
about_us.0014: Estimates daily pregnancy calorie needs using a transparent calorie formula and pregnancy-week adjustment.
about_us.0015: Shows macro targets for protein, carbohydrates, and fats with practical food examples.
about_us.0016: Provides trimester and week-aware nutrition summaries, meal planning examples, and weight-trend references.
about_us.0017: Uses AI to make educational guidance easier to read and more relevant to the user's inputs.
about_us.0019: The tool is designed around widely used nutrition principles, including Mifflin-St Jeor resting energy estimation, activity factors, pregnancy calorie additions, and the Institute of Medicine / National Academies pregnancy weight gain guidance. The site also references mainstream public-health guidance from the
about_us.0022: American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists (ACOG)
about_us.0024: AI output is constrained to pregnancy nutrition education, calorie planning, meal ideas, and gentle movement references. The website avoids diagnosis, medication advice, treatment claims, and emergency guidance. Content is reviewed and adjusted to stay plain, supportive, and aligned with the site's medical disclaimer.
about_us.0026: The website is operated as a personal independent SaaS project by Tao Xu. For support, corrections, privacy requests, billing questions, or content feedback, contact
about_us.0029: The project was developed by studying pregnancy calorie estimation methods, public pregnancy nutrition guidance, and common user questions around trimester calorie needs, macro targets, meal planning, and weekly weight tracking. The calculator is tested with multiple pregnancy-week, BMI, activity, and pregnancy-type scenarios before updates are deployed.
about_us.0031: We keep the calculation process transparent, show the formula steps on the result page, and separate educational nutrition guidance from medical decisions. AI-generated content is reviewed through prompt boundaries and content checks so it stays focused on pregnancy nutrition support.
about_us.0033: This website is not a healthcare provider. Users should use the results as educational starting points and review personal pregnancy nutrition, weight gain, symptoms, or medical conditions with an obstetrician, physician, registered dietitian, midwife, or qualified healthcare professional.
about_us.0034: Written and reviewed by the AI Pregnancy Calorie Calculator content team. Last updated: 05/13/2026.

contact_us.0024: If you notice unclear wording, outdated guidance, or a result that seems confusing, send the page URL and the input context that created the issue. This helps us improve the educational content and AI review process.

cookie_policy.0001: Cookie Policy and Local Storage | AI Pregnancy Tool
cookie_policy.0002: Read our Cookie Policy to understand essential cookies, local storage, account sessions, AI cache, Stripe checkout, and browser controls for this tool.
cookie_policy.0010: This Cookie Policy explains how AI Pregnancy Calorie Calculator uses essential cookies, local storage, and similar browser technologies to run the calculator, account login, AI cache, and subscription access.
cookie_policy.0012: Cookies are small files stored by your browser. Local storage is a browser feature that keeps information on your device. We use these technologies only where they support site functionality, security, or convenience.
cookie_policy.0013: How this site uses browser storage
cookie_policy.0015: local storage may remember your age, height, weight, pregnancy week, activity level, unit setting, and optional preferences.
cookie_policy.0017: local storage may save pregnancy week, save date, weekly weight records, and report preferences so the tracker can work on return visits.
cookie_policy.0019: repeated AI guidance requests for the same input set may load faster through local caching.
cookie_policy.0021: secure session cookies support login, logout, password reset state, and Premium access checks.
cookie_policy.0023: Stripe may use its own cookies or browser technologies during checkout and customer portal sessions.
cookie_policy.0025: The current website does not rely on optional advertising cookies. Hosting providers may still process technical logs to deliver the website, prevent abuse, diagnose errors, and measure reliability.
cookie_policy.0027: You can clear cookies and local storage through your browser settings. Clearing site data may remove saved calculator inputs, weekly records, cached AI guidance, and login state.

home.0094: Personalized Calorie Goals for Every Trimester
home.0095: This pregnancy calorie calculator uses age, height, pre-pregnancy weight, pregnancy week, pregnancy type, and daily activity level to estimate a daily calorie reference for pregnancy. It supports all trimesters and Weeks 1-42, so users can see how calorie needs may change as pregnancy progresses.
home.0096: Pregnancy nutrition matters because energy, protein, carbohydrates, fats, hydration, and steady meals all support maternal wellbeing and fetal growth. The result is designed as a practical conversation starter for users and their healthcare providers.
home.0097: To learn why the tool was built and how content is reviewed, read
home.0098: About Our AI Pregnancy Calorie Calculator
home.0099: . For support or content corrections, visit
home.0102: The calculator estimates female BMR with the Mifflin-St Jeor equation, applies an activity factor to estimate TDEE, then adds a week-by-week pregnancy calorie curve for Weeks 1-42. It also shows IOM-style pregnancy weight gain reference ranges, a four-week calorie prediction, fetal development notes, and practical macro targets.
home.0103: After the calorie result is ready, the AI pregnancy nutrition tips use the same six inputs to create personalized diet, movement, and pregnancy reminder modules. Optional focus areas such as nausea, glucose-friendly meal planning, vegetarian meals, low appetite, or heartburn comfort can be added from the result page.
home.0104: Why Choose Our Pregnancy Nutrition Tool
home.0105: The experience is mobile-first, free to start, transparent about its educational limits, and designed for quick daily use. Premium access adds deeper planning tools such as real-time adjustments, meal plans, and progress tracking while the core calculator remains available.

home.0146: How many extra calories do I need during pregnancy?
home.0147: Many users need little to no extra energy early in pregnancy, then more in the second and third trimesters. This calculator shows a week-specific educational estimate based on your inputs.
home.0148: Does the calculator work for all trimesters?
home.0149: Yes. It supports Weeks 1-42 and shows trimester-aware calorie targets, macro ranges, and future four-week calorie predictions.
home.0150: Is this tool safe to use?
home.0151: It is safe as an educational planning tool, but it is not medical advice. Users with pregnancy complications or special care plans should review results with their healthcare provider.
home.0153: It is an educational estimate based on your inputs, IOM 2009 references, and a standard calorie formula. Your care team can personalize it further.
home.0154: Should I eat this exact number every day?
home.0155: No. Use it as a steady target range. Appetite, symptoms, activity, and medical advice can change what works best day to day.
home.0156: When should I ask my care team?
home.0157: Ask your doctor, midwife, or dietitian if your weight pattern changes quickly, you have diabetes or blood pressure concerns, or you have a special care plan.
home.0158: How does the 30-day money-back guarantee work?
home.0159: If you're not satisfied with our service for any reason, you can request a full refund within 30 days of purchase, no questions asked.
home.0160: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
home.0161: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings.
home.0163: Yes, all payments are processed securely by Stripe. We never store your credit card details on our servers.

medical_disclaimer.0001: Medical Disclaimer | Pregnancy Calorie Calculator Safety
medical_disclaimer.0002: Read our Medical Disclaimer to understand pregnancy calorie estimates, meal ideas, weight tracking, and AI nutrition guidance are educational, not care.
medical_disclaimer.0010: Important medical disclaimer: this tool is for nutrition reference only.
medical_disclaimer.0011: It does not replace diagnosis, treatment, medical advice, or personalized care from a doctor, midwife, registered dietitian, or other qualified healthcare professional.
medical_disclaimer.0012: Not a substitute for professional care
medical_disclaimer.0013: The calorie estimates, macro targets, pregnancy weight gain references, meal ideas, AI-generated nutrition summaries, and movement suggestions are educational references. They are not a replacement for advice from an obstetrician, physician, midwife, registered dietitian, or qualified healthcare professional who knows your personal health history.
medical_disclaimer.0014: How to use the calculator safely
medical_disclaimer.0015: Use the results as a discussion starting point, not as a final instruction.
medical_disclaimer.0016: Review personal calorie goals, weight changes, appetite issues, supplements, and activity plans with your care team.
medical_disclaimer.0017: Follow your clinician's guidance if you have gestational diabetes, hypertension, multiple pregnancy, eating-disorder history, fetal growth concerns, or other pregnancy complications.
medical_disclaimer.0019: The tool uses educational nutrition concepts, including Mifflin-St Jeor resting energy estimation, activity factors, pregnancy calorie additions, macro ranges, and Institute of Medicine / National Academies pregnancy weight gain references. These references are general and may not fit every person.
medical_disclaimer.0021: AI-generated text can make nutrition information easier to understand, but it may not know your full medical history, lab results, symptoms, allergies, medications, or clinician instructions. The site constrains AI responses to nutrition education and avoids diagnosis or treatment advice.
medical_disclaimer.0023: AI-generated nutrition explanations are checked against site safety rules before display, including nutrition-only scope, no diagnosis, no treatment claims, no medication instructions, and clear care-team reminders. Public medical and nutrition statements are reviewed against source materials from the
medical_disclaimer.0026: American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists (ACOG)
medical_disclaimer.0027: The site content team has product and research experience in AI-powered pregnancy nutrition education, but this review is not a substitute for review by your own obstetrician, physician, registered dietitian, midwife, or qualified healthcare professional.
medical_disclaimer.0029: Contact your healthcare provider for symptoms, fetal movement concerns, rapid weight changes, severe nausea, dehydration, blood pressure concerns, blood sugar concerns, or any situation that feels worrying. For urgent symptoms, call your local emergency number.
medical_disclaimer.0031: If you notice unclear or outdated educational content, contact
medical_disclaimer.0033: Written and reviewed by the AI Pregnancy Calorie Calculator content team. Last updated: 05/13/2026.

privacy_policy.0001: Privacy Policy for Pregnancy Data | AI Calorie Tool
privacy_policy.0002: Read our Privacy Policy to understand how we protect pregnancy calculator data, account details, Stripe payments, AI nutrition requests, and support emails.
privacy_policy.0010: AI Pregnancy Calorie Calculator is a personal SaaS tool operated by Tao Xu. This policy explains what information is needed to provide pregnancy calorie estimates, AI nutrition guidance, account access, and optional Premium subscriptions.
privacy_policy.0012: We collect only the information needed to operate this service:
privacy_policy.0014: your email address and password-protected login session when you create an account.
privacy_policy.0016: age, height, pre-pregnancy weight, pregnancy week, pregnancy type, activity level, unit preference, optional diet preferences, allergies, budget, cooking difficulty, and weekly weight records that you choose to enter.
privacy_policy.0018: the calculator result and the pregnancy nutrition question or customization request you submit, so the AI guidance can be generated.
privacy_policy.0020: subscription status, plan type, Stripe customer ID, renewal or expiration information, and payment event identifiers needed to manage Premium access.
privacy_policy.0022: standard hosting logs such as IP address, browser type, requested URL, date, time, and diagnostic events used for security and reliability.
privacy_policy.0024: Payments are processed by Stripe. We do not store, process, or have access to your full credit card number, CVC, or card authentication details. Stripe may collect billing details and payment method information according to Stripe's own privacy and security practices.
privacy_policy.0026: To calculate daily pregnancy calorie goals, macro targets, weight gain references, and nutrition summaries.
privacy_policy.0027: To generate AI-powered educational pregnancy nutrition guidance based on the inputs you provide.
privacy_policy.0028: To create and manage your account, login session, password reset, subscription status, and Premium access.
privacy_policy.0029: To provide customer support when you contact us.
privacy_policy.0030: To protect the website, prevent abuse, debug errors, and improve service reliability.
privacy_policy.0032: The website may store your recent calculator inputs and weekly tracker records in your browser's local storage. This helps you return to the calculator without re-entering everything. You can clear this data by clearing site data in your browser.
privacy_policy.0034: We use service providers only where needed to operate the product: Vercel for hosting and serverless functions, a database provider for accounts and subscription state, Stripe for payments, Resend for password reset emails, and AI API providers for nutrition guidance requests. We do not sell personal data.
privacy_policy.0036: The pregnancy information you enter is used to produce educational nutrition estimates and AI guidance. It is not used for medical diagnosis, treatment, insurance decisions, or advertising profiling.
privacy_policy.0038: Account and subscription records are kept while your account is active and as needed for security, legal, accounting, or dispute purposes. Browser local storage remains on your device until you clear it. Password reset tokens expire and are invalidated after use.
privacy_policy.0040: You may use the free calculator without subscribing. You may clear browser storage, cancel your subscription through Stripe, or contact us to request access, correction, or deletion of account-related data where applicable law allows.

activity.sedentary.desc: Very little exercise; mostly desk work or resting at home
activity.light.desc: 1-3 days per week of easy walking or prenatal yoga
activity.moderate.desc: 3-5 days per week of brisk walking or swimming
activity.high.desc: 6-7 days per week of regular fitness sessions
activity.veryHigh.desc: Athlete-level training or physically demanding work
pregnancy.multiple.desc: Twin-based educational reference for two or more babies
result.caringPoint: You have a caring starting point
result.guideposts: These are gentle guideposts for Week {week}. Listen to your body, notice hunger and fullness, and let your care team help you personalize the details
result.formula: Based on IOM 2009 guidelines: Mifflin-St Jeor BMR {rawBmr} kcal x BMI adjustment {bmiFactor} = adjusted BMR {adjustedBmr} kcal; adjusted BMR x activity factor {activityFactor} = {tdee} kcal; Week {week} {pregnancyType} pregnancy curve extra = +{extra} kcal; final estimate = {calories} kcal/day. {unitReference}
result.weightGain: Your pre-pregnancy BMI is {bmi} ({bmiCategory}). Based on IOM 2009 guidelines, the {pregnancyType} weight gain reference range is {weightGain}.
weekly.title: Weekly pregnancy calories
weekly.adds: At Week {week}, your pregnancy curve adds +{extra} kcal/day for {pregnancyType} pregnancy
weekly.rangeEnd: Week 42 is the end of this calculator's pregnancy-week range.
safety.reminder: Pregnancy-safe reminder: choose pasteurized dairy, fully cooked eggs/meat/fish/tofu, washed produce, and common supermarket foods. This plan is educational and can be adjusted with your prenatal care team
safety.disclaimer: This plan is educational guidance and does not replace professional medical advice from your prenatal care provider
result.unitReference: Reference units: height {heightCm} cm ({heightIn} in), pre-pregnancy weight {weightKg} kg ({weightLbs} lbs).
mealPlan.title: Personalized one-day pregnancy meal plan
mealPlan.summary: Personalized for {mode}, {budget}, {difficulty}, {culture}, allergies: {allergies}. Total: {totalCalories} kcal/day, target {targetCalories} kcal/day, deviation {deviation} kcal; about {protein}g protein.
ai.languageInstruction: Write all user-visible JSON array items in English. Keep numbers, BMI, kcal, Week {week}, and JSON keys exactly unchanged.
ai.disclaimer: This is educational guidance and does not replace professional medical advice.
qa.usingContext: Using your Week, BMI, calorie target, and meal preferences.
qa.answered: Answered with a short nutrition-only response.
qa.fallback: Live AI was unavailable, so a safety-checked local answer is shown.
fetal.week1_4: Early implantation and the first foundations of the placenta are developing.
fetal.week5_8: Major body systems begin forming, with early heart activity and limb buds developing.
fetal.week9_13: Major organs are formed and the first trimester growth pattern is becoming more established.
fetal.week14_17: The skeleton is strengthening and steady second-trimester growth is underway.
fetal.week18_22: Many parents start noticing movement, and the anatomy scan window commonly falls around this stage.
fetal.week23_27: Brain and lung maturation continue as the baby gains more coordinated movement.
fetal.week28_31: Third-trimester growth accelerates, with more fat storage and ongoing lung development.
fetal.week32_35: The baby is building fat stores and practicing breathing-like movements.
fetal.week36_40: Final growth, positioning, and birth preparation are the main developmental themes.
fetal.week41_42: Post-date monitoring is commonly discussed with the care team while growth and readiness are reviewed.
phrase.1k6mads: choose lower-sodium foods and review your personal sodium range with your prenatal care team.
phrase.16tkqz9: tofu, lentils, Greek yogurt, eggs, beans
phrase.5hj92v: eggs, Greek yogurt, salmon, poultry, lentils

phrase.1crhjhy: avocado, olive oil, walnuts, chia seeds, salmon

phrase.1786xgs: Try a 15-minute easy walk after one meal.
phrase.kzi5kf: Add one 10-minute walk on calmer days.

phrase.foz0b9: Add one protein snack for the higher target.
phrase.l2wg41: Discuss 200mg DHA with your care team.
phrase.1r4chvu: Keep dinner gentle, with protein and cooked vegetables.
phrase.1sgojfh: Use tofu, lentils, or yogurt at two meals.
phrase.6833xu: Choose oats or beans before sweeter carbs.
phrase.1ofqrjb: Choose halal-certified protein for lunch and dinner.
phrase.1qh4zxx: Pair each meal with a protein food.
phrase.1a4aivo: Use two snacks to steady energy.
phrase.15gcw6a: a body that may welcome extra steady nourishment
phrase.xavhq0: a body that may feel best with protein-rich meals

phrase.k3e2bl: a day with oats, tofu or lentils, yogurt, whole grains, fruit, and nuts
phrase.14zlk86: a day with oats, beans, protein foods, vegetables, berries, and balanced snacks
phrase.ce9f92: a day with oats, rice or potatoes, chicken or eggs, milk, fruit, and nuts

phrase.8shzgn: Today, try starting one meal with eggs, yogurt, tofu, or chicken, then add your favorite grains.

phrase.lkyv0q: Today, try adding salmon, eggs, or milk to one meal if those fit your routine.
phrase.qfvuh8: Today, try adding one apple and a small handful of nuts in the afternoon.

dropdown.dailyActivity.title: Daily activity
dropdown.dailyActivity.sedentary.label: Sedentary · factor 1.2
dropdown.dailyActivity.sedentary.desc: Very little exercise; mostly desk work or resting at home
